relative_path: Protocols, instructions/Tissue dissociation, organoids and iPDCs/Primary Organoid Culture Protocol_Huntsman Lab.docx
full_text:
Part 1: Primary Organoid Culture Protocol

Pre-warm collagenase (in Fridge) prior to receiving tissue sample

Collagenase D – sterile filtered 0.125g in 50 mL HBSS

Wash/rinse tissue sample briefly in HBSS

Mince tissue well using sterile scissors + forceps

Add 5 mL collagenase to each sample and transfer into autoclaved 125mL Erlenmeyer flask with stirring bar (other sizes may work; use 10 mL pipette for transfer)

Carefully reseal flask and incubate 1 hr at 30-37C while stirring

Transfer sample from flask into 15 mL tube (use 10 mL pipette) and spin for 4.5 mins at 1000 rpm

Aspirate as much media as possible and resuspend cells in 4 mL progenitor isolation media

Transfer cells with P1000 into a new 60 mm petri dish

Try to exclude transferring chunks of tissue (major source of fibroblast growth)

Add 4 uL gentamycin to media

Incubate & change media as needed (usually 1-2x per week)

Part 2: Plating 3D Organoid Cultures

Thaw Matrigel aliquot in fridge and keep on ice at all times (~2-3 hours to thaw in fridge); freeze 200 uL tips*

When dish is ~80% confluent trypsinize dish (use Trypsin LE)

Spin cells down for 4.5 mins at 1000 rpm

Warm 24-well plates in incubator

Aspirate as much media as possible

Count cells

Resuspend pellet in 50 uL Matrigel per 25 000 cells (cells should be resuspended in minimum 70% matrigel solution)

Using cold tips, plate 50 uL Matrigel-cell mix into the center of each well of a 24-well plate

Incubate plates at 37C (in incubator) for at least 10 minutes

Add 480-500 uL Organoid Expansion Media to each well

Part 3: Passaging 3D Organoid Cultures

Remove media with P1000

Dissolve MatriGel using 1 mL cold Advanced DMEM-F12 (no FBS) (per well)

Transfer into 15 mL conical tube

Add additional Advanced DMEM-F12 to dilute out MatriGel

Spin down cells for 4.5 mins at 1000 rpm

Aspirate and leave ~500 uL at bottom without disturbing pellet

Mix vigorously with pipette (pipette up and down with P1000/P200 to mechanically break up organoids; keep tip near bottom; ~50 times)

Spin down cells 4.5 mins 1000 rpm, remove as much supernatant as possible (be careful, Matrigel may prevent organoids from properly pelleting)

Replate in MatriGel, depending on how many wells you require
